# Age of Production: Wood Pyrolysis Compatibility

Assigns several [Wood Pyrolysis](https://mods.factorio.com/mod/wood-pyrolysis) recipes to
[Age of Production](https://mods.factorio.com/mod/Age-of-Production) buildings.

## All my Age of Production mods

- [AoP: pHactorio Compatibility][aop-pHactorio-compat] - Assigns several pHactorio recipes to Age of Production buildings.
- [AoP: Science Group Compatibility][aop-science-tab-compat] - Small and opinionated compatibility changes between Age of
  Production and Science Group.
- [AoP: Wood pyrolysis][aop-wood-pyrolysis-compat] - Assigns several Wood Pyrolysis recipes to Age of Production buildings.

[aop-pHactorio-compat]: https://mods.factorio.com/mod/aop-pHactorio-compat
[aop-science-tab-compat]: https://mods.factorio.com/mod/aop-science-tab-compat
[aop-wood-pyrolysis-compat]: https://mods.factorio.com/mod/aop-wood-pyrolysis-compat
